domain_expertise.evidence: Implemented RAG systems, multi-agent workflows with LangGraph, and optimized LLM token/API usage.
Handled 1.9M requests with k6 load testing and optimized hybrid data models for nested comment threads.
Built and deployed end-to-end community platform (Convoxa) using React Native, PostgreSQL, and Node.js.

soft_skills_signals.justification: Explicitly states: 'Building based on real user behavior — not assumptions' regarding poll implementation.
Cites specific quantitative impact: 'Improved persona generation latency by ~60% and reduced LLM API costs by ~40%'.
Detailed the 'Hybrid Data Model (Materialized Path + Adjacency List)' solution to overcome recursive query performance bottlenecks.

skill_gaps_or_blind_spots: No evidence of formal DevOps orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes/Terraform) beyond managed Cloud Run services.
Limited public evidence of CI/CD pipeline management or infrastructure-as-code expertise.
data.skill_progression_narrative: Vamsi began by establishing strong algorithmic foundations, evidenced by his Knight rank on LeetCode. He transitioned into practical backend and full-stack development, culminating in the independent architecture of Convoxa, before specializing in applied AI and multi-agent RAG systems at RefractOne.
data.data_confidence_rationale: Data is supported by a LinkedIn profile containing specific architectural case studies, quantified performance metrics, and verified project outcomes.
